title: Tasty Vanilla | Food Mod
description:
An Expansion to Minecraft’s Food System.

Farm and harvest new crops, cook new food recipes, collect different berries and make jams, all while staying true to vanila mechanics and feel.
body:
<center>
  
![Tasty Vanilla Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5580fd5ae1135d3928d58172130768f4afc938c2.png)
### A Delicious Expansion to Minecraft’s Food System

Farm and harvest new crops and berries, and cook new food recipes, all while staying true to vanila mechanics and feel.

</center>

**Tasty Vanilla** adds new food and farming related content designed to blend with the vanilla mechanics of the game.

Each addition is carefully coded and each texture designed to preserve Minecraft's signature style and simplicity while making it more fun to grow, cook, and enjoy new foods.

From baking artisanal bread and crafting all sorts of pies, to cultivating new crops and finding new bushes, it expands the culinary experience and enhances your world with a richer, more immersive food system.

## What’s included

![Seeds and Crops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca012247ab24a5326da716e1e84d4ae12db5723e.png)
<center>
  
  </center>

This release adds variety to farming in Minecraft with 8 new crops to grow and 12 new food items to craft, including a new type of dough and bread. Find seeds and crops in sunken ships, village houses, or from Wandering Villagers, and trade with farmers who now plant these crops. Use the new crops to feed your animals, and expand your farm life.

Features:

- **Crops** | Grow 8 new crops to expand your farming options.
- **Food** | Craft 12 new food items, including 1 additional bread.
- **Ranch** | Feed your farm animals with freshly harvested crops.
- **Exploring** | Discover seeds and crops in sunken ships and village houses.
- **Trading** | Trade with farmers and Wandering Villagers for seeds and crops.

</details>

_Compatible with [Serene Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons) 
by Adubbz._

_Some textures and mechanics are based on [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) by vectorwing and other crop mods._

# 

![Tasty Vanilla Berries and Jams](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60c00b0da7f2f1b13c370cb320d2853a2d65062c.png)

Berries & Jams Update

This release brings a sweet twist to Minecraft farming with 8 new berries to discover and 9 jam recipes to cook. Explore forest and cold biomes to find berry patches, craft glass jars to cook your jams, and trade your harvest with Master Butchers. Expand your culinary options and make your world a little sweeter.

Features:

**Berries** | Find 8 new berries in their unique spawn biomes.

**Jams** | Cook 9 different jam recipes and store them in crafted glass jars.

**Jars** | Craft glass jars to hold your jams and decorate your storage.

**Trading** | Trade berries for emeralds with Master Butchers.

**Exploring** | Discover berry patches in diverse biomes across your world.

**Happy Foxes** | Berries found where Foxes spawn, can be used to feed them.

### Berries
![Tasty Vanilla Berries](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33670ccc7923a1778dfcef8c01f154e05d19d89e.png)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- **Blackberries** | Found on shaded forests
- **Blueberries** | Found on spruce forests
- **Elderberries** | Found on birch forests
- **Goji Berries** | Found on some windswept biomes
- **Gooseberries** | Found on some temperate forests
- **Raspberries** | Found on different forests
- **Strawberries** | Found on plains and meadows
- **White Currants** | Found on some cold biomes

</details>

### Jams

![Tasty Vanilla Jams](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb810065db898f98afcbd7fcaac54b4997e84488.png)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Blackberry Mash & Blackberry Jam
- Blueberry Mash & Blueberry Jam
- Elderberry Mash & Elderberry Jam
- Goji Berry Mash & Goji Berry Jam
- Gooseberry Mash & Gooseberry Jam
- Raspberry Mash & Raspberry Jam
- Sweet Berry Mash & Sweet Berry Jam
- Strawberry Mash & Strawberry Jam
- White Currant Mash & White Currant Jam

Craft berry mash and cook it in a smelter or smoker to make it a jam.

</details>

### Glass Jar

![Tasty Vanilla Glass Jar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc60d73b8c2197a4c3dc805a1e1d431466756d0a.png)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- 7 Glass = 7 Glass Jars

</details>

# 

![Flour and Yeast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff94dbeadd52e3f129432e571e4a1fb194f13276.png)

Take artisanal baking to the next level with this release, which introduces ingredients like flour, yeast, salt, and butter. Bake dough to create fresh bread and add a fun twist to the usual cooking process.

**Flour & Yeast** | Essential for making doughs used in bread recipes.

**Salt & Butter** | New crafting items for baking and cooking.

**Dough Mechanic** | Mix ingredients to craft dough, then bake it in a furnace or smoker.

**Sugar & Salt Blocks** | Decorative and practical blocks to store resources.


### Baking Ingredients

![Baking Ingredients](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2c12f3f01909a82d89b6dde83c471abca0b72e0.png)


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Flour | 1 Wheat = 1 Flour
- Salt | Stonecutter 1 Calcite = 6 Salt
- Butter | 1 Milk Bucket + 1 Salt = 3 Butter
- Yeast | 1 Seed (any) + 1 Red or Brown Mushroom + 1 Sugar = 3 Yeast

</details>

# 


![Cookies and Pies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bdded368192a97c8d23e0bfe0ec9aa637c492d9.png)

This first release added a variety of sweet treats to your game, introducing cookies and pies that follow vanilla recipes. Simple ingredients, familiar mechanics, and delicious results.

- **Vanilla Recipes** |  New cookies and pies recipes use wheat, sugar, eggs, and other vanilla ingredients.
- **Pies** | 14 new pie recipes.
- **Cookies** | 11 new cookie recipes.
